reviews.review_title: I have to go play some games because I
reviews.review_description: Because I don’t have any friends because I’m not really good with people so this is the best thing I’ve seen today because I have friends now so ya um you u think that it is a bad game but it isn’t soya?

I hate the fly taggers even when they say "TaG mE!" But still good game when you could just play without mods. It's also really fun with the fortnite emote wheel.If you wanna know some bannable mods here it is: "Fly" "Speed boost" "Platforms" "TP Gun" "Ghost Monke" and "Invis Monke". Some legal mods:  "Mosa Boost" "Steam Arms" "Long Arms" the perfect combo.

My current name is nightmare. I am super fast and ground even without mods. I was running someone on ground and they thought I was using mods even though I didn’t even have the mod menu equipped and the whole lobby reported me like 40 times and now I’m banned for an hour.
￼

hi, I’m Jaydenvr or icegt11 Would you please give me moderator like please just for like two or one days, so I can prank my Friend I enjoy your game. I like the mods and stuff. I’m just saying, I don’t care if you say no. But again, I like your game 
￼￼

I feel like I should be a mod because I don't hack. Plus I reported and supposedly kicked/banned a lot of fake bots and fly taggers.
I'm a really good player without mods and will help the community
